visa_types.name: Working Holidays Scheme
visa_types.documents_required:
Click here (https://www.vn.emb-japan.go.jp/itprtop_vi/index.html) to find the required documents for applicants who apply in Hanoi.
Or
Click here (https://www.hcmcgj.vn.emb-japan.go.jp/itpr_vi/thithuc.html) to find the required documents for applicants who apply in Ho Chi  Minh City.
visa_types.visa_fees:
All visa fees must be paid in  Vietnamese Dong in cash with the application. 

[jpn > vnm > en > Table:Working Holidays Scheme > Visa Fees 1]
Service  fee

[jpn > vnm > en > Table:Working Holidays Scheme > Visa Fees 2]
Note: 
- The VFS Global Service fee must       be paid in Vietnamese Dong in cash with the application.
- The service fee is inclusive of       all applicable taxes.
- All  fees are non-refundable.
visa_types.processing_time:
The  standard processing time is 9 working days after the application is submitted.
5 working days excluding the date of the application in Hochiminh (Some cases will need time to consider more than 5 working days)
Visa Application Form (http://www.mofa.go.jp/mofaj/files/000124525.pdf)
visa_types.overview:
Overview
With the aim of giving young Vietnamese people the  opportunity to gain a deeper understanding of the culture and general way of  life of Japan, the working holiday scheme will allow those who meet the  conditions to stay on holiday in Japan for up to one year and secondarily to  take up employment there in order to supplement their travel funds.
            Please note that Working Holiday applications must be  submitted in person. 
- Temporary visitor  visa is for those who are visiting Japan up to 90 days for purposes of  sightseeing, visits relatives, friends, or acquaintances; and short-term  business affairs.
- The basic documents  (The required documents for the visa application submission) must be followed  the instruction from Japanese Embassy. Applicants  must prepare the original documents with the copies in case you do not have the  certified copies. You should be aware that the submission could be rejected if  you do not submit required supporting documents.
- All the documents which had been submitted will not be  returned to applicants. Applicants demand the officers if they want to get any  supporting documents back. Beyond, applicants should bring the copies of the  mandatory documents (Eg: Marriage certificate, Birth certificate, Household  registration book, ect...) which need to be returned after the submission time.
- Except the Transit visa case, the Embassy Officers do not  require applicants providing flight tickets as the mandatory documents. If  applicants wish to submit flight booking/ flight ticket details, Embassy and  VFS officers do not take the responsibility in case the visa result is  rejected.
- After submitting application, in the processing time, Embassy  may require applicants providing more supporting documents or interviewing. In  case applicants could not provide more supporting documents or decline to take  the interview, visa processing time will be affected.
- Except the case Embassy requires to submit supporting  documents through FAX, please do not send Visa application documents to Embassy  by post or FAX. Documents which are sent directly to Embassy is not considered  as Basic Documents, moreover, Embassy will not except visa application based on  these applications.
- Kindly bring your expired passport (in case you have one)  with your valid passport to submit for the visa application.
- Processing time for a visa applicant is at least 9 business days (not including the date of filing at the reception center VFS). Embassy cannot approve visa sooner unless humanitarian cases etc.so you should schedule timetable to conduct visa as soon ahead of schedule.
- If your visa application is refused, then you should not carry out visa  application with the same purpose within 6 months from the date of refusal.  Embassy does not publish reasons for refusing a visa application.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
With the aim of giving young Vietnamese people the  opportunity to gain a deeper understanding of the culture and general way of  life of Japan, the working holiday scheme will allow those who meet the  conditions to stay on holiday in Japan for up to one year and secondarily to  take up employment there in order to supplement their travel funds.
            Please note that Working Holiday applications must be  submitted in person. 
- Temporary visitor  visa is for those who are visiting Japan up to 90 days for purposes of  sightseeing, visits relatives, friends, or acquaintances; and short-term  business affairs.
- The basic documents  (The required documents for the visa application submission) must be followed  the instruction from Japanese Embassy. Applicants  must prepare the original documents with the copies in case you do not have the  certified copies. You should be aware that the submission could be rejected if  you do not submit required supporting documents.
- All the documents which had been submitted will not be  returned to applicants. Applicants demand the officers if they want to get any  supporting documents back. Beyond, applicants should bring the copies of the  mandatory documents (Eg: Marriage certificate, Birth certificate, Household  registration book, ect...) which need to be returned after the submission time.
- Except the Transit visa case, the Embassy Officers do not  require applicants providing flight tickets as the mandatory documents. If  applicants wish to submit flight booking/ flight ticket details, Embassy and  VFS officers do not take the responsibility in case the visa result is  rejected.
- After submitting application, in the processing time, Embassy  may require applicants providing more supporting documents or interviewing. In  case applicants could not provide more supporting documents or decline to take  the interview, visa processing time will be affected.
- Except the case Embassy requires to submit supporting  documents through FAX, please do not send Visa application documents to Embassy  by post or FAX. Documents which are sent directly to Embassy is not considered  as Basic Documents, moreover, Embassy will not except visa application based on  these applications.
- Kindly bring your expired passport (in case you have one)  with your valid passport to submit for the visa application.
- Processing time for a visa applicant is at least 9 business days (not including the date of filing at the reception center VFS). Embassy cannot approve visa sooner unless humanitarian cases etc.so you should schedule timetable to conduct visa as soon ahead of schedule.
- If your visa application is refused, then you should not carry out visa  application with the same purpose within 6 months from the date of refusal.  Embassy does not publish reasons for refusing a visa application.

## Visa Fees
All visa fees must be paid in  Vietnamese Dong in cash with the application. 

[jpn > vnm > en > Table:Working Holidays Scheme > Visa Fees 1]
Service  fee

[jpn > vnm > en > Table:Working Holidays Scheme > Visa Fees 2]
Note: 
- The VFS Global Service fee must       be paid in Vietnamese Dong in cash with the application.
- The service fee is inclusive of       all applicable taxes.
- All  fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
Click here (https://www.vn.emb-japan.go.jp/itprtop_vi/index.html) to find the required documents for applicants who apply in Hanoi.
Or
Click here (https://www.hcmcgj.vn.emb-japan.go.jp/itpr_vi/thithuc.html) to find the required documents for applicants who apply in Ho Chi  Minh City.

## Photo Specifications
Please submit one photograph along with  your visa application. The photograph must be:
- Not more than 6 months old
- 3.5cm x 4.5cm
- Either black-and-white or colored, with  plain background
- Taken looking straight forward and face  seen clearly
Visa Application Form (http://www.mofa.go.jp/mofaj/files/000124525.pdf)

## Processing Time
The  standard processing time is 9 working days after the application is submitted.
5 working days excluding the date of the application in Hochiminh (Some cases will need time to consider more than 5 working days)
Visa Application Form (http://www.mofa.go.jp/mofaj/files/000124525.pdf)

## Download Forms

## Download  Forms here:

Visa Application Form to Japan
Letter of Reason for Invitation
Schedule of Stay
Letter of Guarantee

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Foreigners who would like to perform remunerative work in Japan  or for long term stays over 90 days in Japan etc. which are for purposes other  than that of temporary visitor, should apply for a “Certificate of Eligibility”  in Japan at the Regional Immigration Bureau of Japan nearby before the visa  application.
- Temporary visitor  visa is for those who are visiting Japan up to 90 days for purposes of  sightseeing, visits relatives, friends, or acquaintances; and short-term  business affairs.
- The basic documents  (The required documents for the visa application submission) must be followed  the instruction from Japanese Embassy. Applicants  must prepare the original documents with the copies in case you do not have the  certified copies. You should be aware that the submission could be rejected if  you do not submit required supporting documents.
- All the documents which had been submitted will not be  returned to applicants. Applicants demand the officers if they want to get any  supporting documents back. Beyond, applicants should bring the copies of the  mandatory documents (Eg: Marriage certificate, Birth certificate, Household  registration book, ect...) which need to be returned after the submission time.
- Except the Transit visa case, the Embassy Officers do not  require applicants providing flight tickets as the mandatory documents. If  applicants wish to submit flight booking/ flight ticket details, Embassy and  VFS officers do not take the responsibility in case the visa result is  rejected.
- After submitting application, in the processing time, Embassy  may require applicants providing more supporting documents or interviewing. In  case applicants could not provide more supporting documents or decline to take  the interview, visa processing time will be affected.
- Except the case Embassy requires to submit supporting  documents through FAX, please do not send Visa application documents to Embassy  by post or FAX. Documents which are sent directly to Embassy is not considered  as Basic Documents, moreover, Embassy will not except visa application based on  these applications.
- Kindly bring your expired passport (in case you have one)  with your valid passport to submit for the visa application.
- Processing time for a visa applicant is at least 9 business days (not including the date of filing at the reception center VFS). Embassy cannot approve visa sooner unless humanitarian cases etc.so you should schedule timetable to conduct visa as soon ahead of schedule.
- If your visa application is refused, then you should not carry out visa  application with the same purpose within 6 months from the date of refusal.  Embassy does not publish reasons for refusing a visa application.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Foreigners who would like to perform remunerative work in Japan  or for long term stays over 90 days in Japan etc. which are for purposes other  than that of temporary visitor, should apply for a “Certificate of Eligibility”  in Japan at the Regional Immigration Bureau of Japan nearby before the visa  application.
- Temporary visitor  visa is for those who are visiting Japan up to 90 days for purposes of  sightseeing, visits relatives, friends, or acquaintances; and short-term  business affairs.
- The basic documents  (The required documents for the visa application submission) must be followed  the instruction from Japanese Embassy. Applicants  must prepare the original documents with the copies in case you do not have the  certified copies. You should be aware that the submission could be rejected if  you do not submit required supporting documents.
- All the documents which had been submitted will not be  returned to applicants. Applicants demand the officers if they want to get any  supporting documents back. Beyond, applicants should bring the copies of the  mandatory documents (Eg: Marriage certificate, Birth certificate, Household  registration book, ect...) which need to be returned after the submission time.
- Except the Transit visa case, the Embassy Officers do not  require applicants providing flight tickets as the mandatory documents. If  applicants wish to submit flight booking/ flight ticket details, Embassy and  VFS officers do not take the responsibility in case the visa result is  rejected.
- After submitting application, in the processing time, Embassy  may require applicants providing more supporting documents or interviewing. In  case applicants could not provide more supporting documents or decline to take  the interview, visa processing time will be affected.
- Except the case Embassy requires to submit supporting  documents through FAX, please do not send Visa application documents to Embassy  by post or FAX. Documents which are sent directly to Embassy is not considered  as Basic Documents, moreover, Embassy will not except visa application based on  these applications.
- Kindly bring your expired passport (in case you have one)  with your valid passport to submit for the visa application.
- Processing time for a visa applicant is at least 9 business days (not including the date of filing at the reception center VFS). Embassy cannot approve visa sooner unless humanitarian cases etc.so you should schedule timetable to conduct visa as soon ahead of schedule.
- If your visa application is refused, then you should not carry out visa  application with the same purpose within 6 months from the date of refusal.  Embassy does not publish reasons for refusing a visa application.

## Visa Fees
All visa fees must be paid in  Vietnamese Dong in cash with the application. 

[jpn > vnm > en > Table:Visa Application For Holders Of Certificate Of Eligibility > Visa Fees 1]
Service  fee

[jpn > vnm > en > Table:Visa Application For Holders Of Certificate Of Eligibility > Visa Fees 2]
Note: 
- The VFS Global Service fee must       be paid in Vietnamese Dong in cash with the application.
- The service fee is inclusive of       all applicable taxes.
- All  fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
Click here (https://www.vn.emb-japan.go.jp/itprtop_vi/index.html) to find the required documents for applicants who apply in Hanoi.
Or
Click here (https://www.hcmcgj.vn.emb-japan.go.jp/itpr_vi/thithuc.html) to find the required documents for applicants who apply in Ho Chi  Minh City.

## Photo Specifications
Please submit one photograph along with your visa application. The photograph must be 3.5cm x 4.5cm and not more than 6 months old

## Processing Time
6 working days excluding the date of the application in Hanoi (Some cases will need time to consider more than 6 working days)
5 working days excluding the date of the application in Hochiminh (Some cases will need time to consider more than 5 working days)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Visitor visa is for those who are visiting Japan up to 90 days for purposes of sightseeing, business and visits relatives, friends, or acquaintances.
Transit visa is for those who are stopping over in Japan while en route to another country due to flight schedules.
All the above purposes of journey to Japan shall exclude any activities engaging or involving the management of business or remuneration.
Please only apply for a visa within 3 months of your intended travel date.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Visitor visa is for those who are visiting Japan up to 90 days for purposes of sightseeing, business and visits relatives, friends, or acquaintances.
Transit visa is for those who are stopping over in Japan while en route to another country due to flight schedules.
All the above purposes of journey to Japan shall exclude any activities engaging or involving the management of business or remuneration.
Please only apply for a visa within 3 months of your intended travel date.

## Visa Fees
All visa fees must be paid in  Vietnamese Dong in cash with the application. 

[jpn > vnm > en > Table:Temporary Visitor Visa > Visa Fees 1]
Service  fee

[jpn > vnm > en > Table:Temporary Visitor Visa > Visa Fees 2]
Note: 
- The VFS Global Service fee must       be paid in Vietnamese Dong in cash with the application.
- The service fee is inclusive of       all applicable taxes.
- All  fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
Click here (https://www.vn.emb-japan.go.jp/itprtop_vi/index.html) to find the required documents for applicants who apply in Hanoi.
Or
Click here (https://www.hcmcgj.vn.emb-japan.go.jp/itpr_vi/thithuc.html) to find the required documents for applicants who apply in Ho Chi  Minh City.

## Photo Specifications
Please submit one photograph along with your visa application. The photograph must be 3.5cm x 4.5cm and not more than 6 months old

## Processing Time
6 working days excluding the date of the application in Hanoi (Some cases will need time to consider more than 6 working days)
5 working days excluding the date of the application in Hochiminh (Some cases will need time to consider more than 5 working days)

Letter of Reason for Invitation
Schedule of Stay

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Medical  Stay (http://www.mofa.go.jp/j_info/visit/visa/medical_stay.html)
The visa is issued to foreign patients wishing to visit Japan  for medical purposes (including full medical check-ups). The visa is issued to  their accompanying person(s) as well if necessary and as needed.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Medical  Stay (http://www.mofa.go.jp/j_info/visit/visa/medical_stay.html)
The visa is issued to foreign patients wishing to visit Japan  for medical purposes (including full medical check-ups). The visa is issued to  their accompanying person(s) as well if necessary and as needed.

## Visa Fees
All visa fees must be paid in  Vietnamese Dong in cash with the application. 

[jpn > vnm > en > Table:Medical Stay > Visa Fees 1]
Service  fee

[jpn > vnm > en > Table:Medical Stay > Visa Fees 2]
Note: 
- The VFS Global Service fee must       be paid in Vietnamese Dong in cash with the application.
- The service fee is inclusive of       all applicable taxes.
- All  fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
Click here (https://www.vn.emb-japan.go.jp/itprtop_vi/index.html) to find the required documents for applicants who apply in Hanoi.
Or
Click here (https://www.hcmcgj.vn.emb-japan.go.jp/itpr_vi/thithuc.html) to find the required documents for applicants who apply in Ho Chi  Minh City.

## Photo Specifications
Please submit one photograph along with  your visa application. The photograph must be:
- Not more than 6 months old
- 3.5cm x 4.5cm
- Either black-and-white or colored, with  plain background
- Taken  looking straight forward and face seen clearly

## Processing Time
6 working days excluding the date of the application in Hanoi (Some cases will need time to consider more than 6 working days)
